title: Build a House
goalDescription: Saving toward construction costs for a house, whether starting from a bare plot or building in phases.
resultIntro: Here's a starting point for saving toward your build, based on what you entered.

questions.label: Estimated total build cost
questions.help: A rough estimate is fine — you can always come back and adjust it.

questions.label: Amount already saved toward this goal
Expected annual return on savings (%)
questions.help: Leave at 0% if this will sit in a regular savings account rather than an interest-bearing one.
